desc:
Those looking for a contemporary and comfortable apartment in a central location are sure to be impressed by this wonderful one-bedroom one-bathroom abode.

Inside you'll find modern finishes and fixtures throughout as well as reverse cycle heating and cooling to keep you comfortable year-round.

The kitchen has all that you could need including stainless steel appliances, stylish soft closing cabinetry, sweeping bench-tops, and from here opens to the living and dining room. Sliding glass doors lead you outside to the balcony, a perfect spot to enjoy your morning coffee or an evening meal at the end of the day.

The bedroom is a great size and has two built-in robes, and in the bathroom you'll be delighted to see floor-to-ceiling tiles and a large shower. There is a car space with a storage cage that add further convenience to this fantastic apartment.

The ideal location places you within a short distance of a great selection of restaurants, bars and cafes. Local parks, galleries and shops are also close by, as is the light rail.

Features include: 
- Open plan living and dining with views over the balcony
- Designer kitchen with electric stovetop and oven, integrated dishwasher and plenty of bench space
- Large, modern bathroom 
- Double glazed windows, reverse cycle heating and cooling 
- European laundry with washer/dryer combo included
- NBN connection 
- Resident's carpark with storage cage
- Ground floor gym, rooftop terrace with BBQ entertaining area
- Short walk to the light rail, local shops and cafes 
- Minutes from the Canberra Centre 
- Applicants to seek permission to keep pets
- EER not available
- Available 1st of May 2026

Inspection Guidelines:

(For www.canberrapropertypartners.com.au and www.allhomes.com.au only)

This is more than just an apartment—it’s a lifestyle opportunity in one of Canberra’s most connected inner-north locations. Inspect with confidence and act quickly.

desc:
Privately positioned at the rear on a battle-axe block, 11 Winton Place, Holder delivers scale, flexibility and comfort in one of Weston Creek’s most tightly held pockets.

Extended to accommodate larger or growing families, this spacious residence offers five bedrooms, multiple living zones and excellent segregation — all freshly refreshed and ready for its next chapter.

Recently updated throughout, the home has been fully repainted internally, features new carpet in the lounge room, and is complemented by brand new curtains, creating a clean and modern feel from the moment you step inside.

Energy efficiency is a standout feature, with a substantial 13.2kW solar system, double glazing throughout and an excellent 5.5 EER rating, delivering year-round comfort and reduced energy costs, while placing the home ahead of many comparable properties in the area for efficiency and sustainability.

Designed for Real Family Living:
* Five generous bedrooms
* Two master suites, each with ensuite
* Formal living room
* Separate family living area with new carpet
* Central kitchen overlooking dining and living zones
* Dedicated study/home office
* 13.2K Solar on roof
* Tiles throughout all bedrooms
* Updated ensuite to bedroom
* Ducted gas heating and cooling inside
* Built-in wardrobes to bedrooms
* Dishwasher included
* Fully fenced yard
* Outdoor entertaining area
* Broadband (nbn-ready)
* Main bathroom with separate WC
* Double garage with internal access
* Private and quiet battle-axe position

Key Statistics (Approx):
Residence - 206.66 sqm
Garage - 47.99 sq/m
Block - 1,178 sq/m

The thoughtful extension enhances the home’s functionality and bedroom separation, making it ideal for families needing both space and privacy.

Located in the established and family-friendly suburb of Holder, you are moments to quality schools, parkland, Cooleman Court Shopping Centre and convenient access to Woden and the CBD.

A substantial family home offering space, privacy and long-term flexibility — ready to be secured on Auction day.

Disclaimer:
Canberra Property Partners endeavours to ensure the accuracy of all marketing material; however, no warranty is given and interested parties are encouraged to rely on their own enquiries.
headline: Substantial Five-Bedroom Family Home – Extended, Refreshed & Ready

desc:
Perfectly positioned in the thriving Molonglo Valley, 3A Woodberry Avenue, Coombs presents an outstanding opportunity to secure a stylish, low-maintenance home in one of Canberra’s most desirable and rapidly growing communities.

Beautifully designed for modern living, this contemporary residence combines sleek finishes, light-filled spaces and practical comfort, making it ideal for first home buyers, down-sizers, or savvy investors seeking a quality property in a prime location.

Step inside and be welcomed by a bright open-plan living and dining area, where elegant floorboards create a warm and inviting atmosphere. The space flows seamlessly into a modern kitchen featuring quality appliances, a gas cooktop and premium finishes, perfect for both everyday living and entertaining.

The home offers three generously sized bedrooms, each with soft carpet underfoot, while the master suite enjoys the added luxury of a private ensuite. Two modern bathrooms service the home with stylish fittings and thoughtful design.

Outside, a private courtyard provides the perfect setting for relaxed outdoor dining, weekend entertaining, or simply enjoying a quiet morning coffee.

Features You'll Love:
• Three spacious bedrooms with plush carpet
• Two modern bathrooms including master ensuite
• Light-filled open plan living and dining
• Contemporary kitchen with gas cooktop and quality finishes
• Ducted heating for year-round comfort
• Double garage providing secure parking and additional storage
• Window furnishings installed throughout the home
• Private low-maintenance courtyard ideal for entertaining

Investment Appeal:
The property is currently tenanted at $700 per week, providing immediate rental income and security for investors looking to add a quality asset to their portfolio.

Conveniently located just moments from local shops, parks, walking trails and quality schools, this beautifully maintained home offers the perfect blend of lifestyle, convenience and modern design.

Whether you’re looking for a smart investment or a future home in a thriving community, 3A Woody Avenue is an opportunity not to be missed.

Key Feature (Approx):
Rates: $604 per quarter
Strata: $521 per quarter
Land Tax (For Investors): $766 per quarter

Certificate of Currency: May 2022

Internal: 98 sq/m (approx)
Garage: 35 sq/m (approx)
Block: 95 sq/m (approx)

Disclaimer: All information has been provided in good faith. Canberra Property Partners recommends purchasers undertake their own investigations to confirm all details.
headline: Modern Comfort in the Heart of Coombs

desc:
Positioned in an unbeatable location within the thriving suburb of Casey, "29 Spratt Court" offers the perfect blend of lifestyle, convenience, and low-maintenance living. With public transport, quality schools, local shops, and a rapidly growing town centre all within easy reach, this property presents an outstanding opportunity for both homeowners and investors alike.

Thoughtfully designed across two levels, this impressive townhouse delivers a practical and comfortable layout. Downstairs features a spacious open-plan living and dining area that seamlessly connects to a generous outdoor courtyard, ideal for entertaining or relaxing. The modern kitchen is well-appointed with quality finishes and functionality in mind, while a cleverly concealed laundry and separate toilet add further convenience.

Upstairs, you will find two generously sized bedrooms, both complete with large built-in wardrobes and an abundance of natural light. The main bathroom is well designed with a large shower, vanity, and toilet, catering perfectly to everyday living.

Set directly opposite natural bushland, the home enjoys a peaceful outlook with open space for children to play and unwind right at your doorstep.

Features:
* Spacious, light-filled open plan living and dining flowing to a large outdoor courtyard with shed
* Modern kitchen with generous bench space, gas cooking, microwave recess, and under-bench oven
* Two large bedrooms, both with built-in wardrobes
* Well-appointed bathroom with large shower, vanity, and toilet
* Additional separate toilet downstairs for added convenience
* Concealed laundry
* Combination of carpet upstairs and tiled flooring downstairs with quality blinds throughout
* Reverse cycle air conditioning and neutral colour palette
* Contemporary façade with landscaped surrounds
* Secure single undercover car park with remote access plus additional street parking
* Secure backyard with shed and direct access from car space
* Positioned opposite natural bushland
* Close proximity to schools, shops, and public transport
* Easy access to main arterial roads and a short drive to the CBD

This is a fantastic opportunity to secure a stylish and low-maintenance home in one of Canberra’s fastest-growing suburbs.

Currently tenanted @ $545 per week if you are looking for a secure investment.

Strata: $208 per quarter (approx)
Water: $215 per quarter (approx)
Land Tax: $789 per quarter (approx) - for investors only
Rates: $575 per quarter (approx)

Internal: 81 sq/m
Carport: 20 sq/m
Block Size: 119 sq/m

Built 2016

Disclaimer: All information has been provided in good faith. Canberra Property Partners recommends purchasers undertake their own investigations to confirm all details.
headline: Modern Living Backing Nature – Stylish Two-Bedroom Townhouse in Prime Casey Location
